llm_eval.notes: Genuine gains confirmed: (1) schema-conformance — output contract now == phase1_output required[purpose,scope,stakeholders,first_impressions,facts_vs_assumptions,concrete_values_to_abstract]; invented keys (raw_observations[] / top-level assumptions[]) removed and facts/assumptions correctly nested under facts_vs_assumptions; scope{in_scope,out_of_scope} object and concrete_values_to_abstract{value,kind} enum aligned to schema. (2) owner-flow — shared_state.md(200c)+raw_observations.json matches owner SKILL.md L217-218. (3) placement — literal 7-layer table & Round1/2 prompts replaced by thin ref to prompt SSOT. RESIDUAL DEFECT (blocks clean PASS, contradicts claimed checked=reference-existence): schema JSON-pointer ref `schemas/phase-output.schema.json#/definitions/phase1_output` (lines 21/37/41) is a BARE relative path that does NOT resolve from agents/ dir; real file is plugins/harness-creator/skills/run-elegant-review/schemas/. Sibling convention (verified) uses skill-qualified prefix: elegant-improvement-executor.md:98 `run-elegant-review/schemas/...`, elegant-logical-structural-analyst.md:21 `run-elegant-review/references/...`. Same file even qualifies the prompt SSOT ref (`run-elegant-review/prompts/R1-phase1-reset.md` L41) while leaving schema refs bare = internal inconsistency. Fix = add `run-elegant-review/` prefix to the 3 schema-pointer lines. Minor pre-existing (not introduced here): prompt SSOT R1-phase1-reset.md output section names only raw_observations.json, not shared_state.md — SKILL.md/agent vs prompt SSOT drift, out of this fix's scope.
